title: ChargePoint Q4 FY2026: Margins Expand Amid Profitability Push
text: ChargePoint's Q4 FY2026 results show margins expanding amid the company's profitability push. The company achieved record gross margins of 33% on a non-GAAP basis and 31% on a GAAP basis. The expanded EBITDA loss improved significantly year-over-year, with the company trending toward breakeven and eventual profitability. Key drivers of margin expansion include the growing contribution of subscription revenue, which carries higher margins than hardware sales, and operational efficiency improvements from the company's restructuring efforts.
